# TARA — Privacy-First Home Intelligence

TARA is a locally-intelligent home assistant that processes everything on-device. No cloud. No cameras. No subscriptions.

## What TARA Does

TARA is a smart home hub that understands your home without invading your privacy:

- **Presence detection** using mmWave radar: detects breathing and micro-movements without cameras
- **Multi-protocol**: speaks Zigbee, Z-Wave, Matter, Thread, Bluetooth, and Wi-Fi
- **Local AI**: all voice commands and automations run on-device, never in the cloud
- **Universal compatibility**: bridges old and new devices seamlessly

## Key Differentiators

- No data leaves your home
- Works without internet
- No facial recognition, no cameras
- Millisecond response times (no cloud round-trip)
- Supports the Matter standard for future-proof compatibility

## Website

- **Homepage**: https://tarahome.ai/
- **Waitlist**: https://tarahome.ai/ (scroll to the form)
- **Blog / Guides**: https://tarahome.ai/blog/
- **Privacy Policy**: https://tarahome.ai/privacy.html

## Blog Articles

### How to Set Up a Fully Local Voice Assistant in Home Assistant (No Cloud, No Alexa)
URL: https://tarahome.ai/blog/home-assistant-local-voice-assistant-no-cloud.html
Category: How-To | 7 min read | Mar 12, 2026
Step-by-step guide to building a fully local voice assistant in Home Assistant using Voice PE, Wyoming protocol, Piper TTS, and openWakeWord—no cloud, no Alexa, no Google.

### How to Add Battery-Powered mmWave Presence Sensors to Home Assistant via Matter & Thread (No Cloud)
URL: https://tarahome.ai/blog/mmwave-matter-thread-presence-sensor-home-assistant.html
Category: How-To | 6 min read | Mar 8, 2026
Step-by-step guide to pairing Aqara FP300 or Meross MS605 Matter-over-Thread mmWave sensors with Home Assistant—fully local, no cloud, no proprietary hub required.

### What Is a Smart Home Hub & Why You Need One
URL: https://tarahome.ai/blog/what-is-smart-home-hub.html
Category: Basics | 5 min read | Mar 1, 2026
A beginner's guide to understanding smart home hubs, protocols, and why local processing beats the cloud.

### How to Set Up Smart Lighting in Every Room
URL: https://tarahome.ai/blog/how-to-set-up-smart-lighting.html
Category: How-To | 7 min read | Feb 20, 2026
Step-by-step guide covering bulb types, protocols (Zigbee, Z-Wave, Matter), zones, automations, and presence-based lighting.

### Matter Protocol Explained: The Future of Smart Homes
URL: https://tarahome.ai/blog/matter-protocol-explained.html
Category: Deep Dive | 6 min read | Feb 10, 2026
Everything about Matter — the universal smart home standard backed by Apple, Google, Amazon, and Samsung.

### How to Run Your Smart Home Without the Cloud
URL: https://tarahome.ai/blog/home-automation-without-cloud.html
Category: How-To | 8 min read | Jan 28, 2026
Practical guide to going local-first: which devices work offline, what to avoid, and how to set up secure remote access.

### Presence Detection: The Missing Piece of Smart Homes
URL: https://tarahome.ai/blog/presence-detection-smart-home.html
Category: Deep Dive | 6 min read | Jan 15, 2026
Why PIR motion sensors fail and how mmWave radar enables true occupancy detection without cameras.

### Smart Home Security: Protect Your Connected Home
URL: https://tarahome.ai/blog/smart-home-security-basics.html
Category: How-To | 7 min read | Jan 5, 2026
Network segmentation, VLAN setup, firmware hygiene, and how local processing reduces your attack surface.

## Company

TARA is currently in pre-launch. Join the waitlist at https://tarahome.ai/ to be notified when the product launches.
